item.description:
Carpenter Homepage 2 - Texts

Navigation

  • Logo: Holzwerk
  • Our Work
  • Services
  • About
  • Get in Touch

Hero Section

  • Tagline: Crafted by Hand, Built to Last
  • Headline: We Build Beautiful Things from Wood
  • Subtext: From handcrafted floors to restored heirlooms and custom camper-van interiors — we bring warmth and craft to every project.

Services Section

  • Label: WHAT WE DO
  • Title: Three Crafts, One Passion
  • Header Right: Every project begins with a plan, a sketch, and a conversation about what matters to you.

01 — Floor Building

  • From classic oak herringbone to wide-plank walnut — we craft floors that ground your space with natural warmth. Every board selected by hand, every joint precise.
  • View floor projects

02 — Furniture Restoration

  • Your grandmother’s dresser deserves a second life. We restore antique and vintage furniture with care, preserving the story while bringing back the beauty.
  • See restorations

03 — Camper-Van Interiors

  • Your home on wheels, built with the same care as a kitchen. Custom cabinetry, fold-out tables, and clever storage — all in solid wood, all made to travel.
  • Explore van builds

Blueprint Strip

  • ┌── detail A
  • scale 1:1 ──┐

CTA Section

  • Label: LET’S BUILD SOMETHING
  • Headline: Have a Project in Mind?
  • Subtext: Every great piece starts with a conversation. Tell us what you’re dreaming of.
  • Button: Start Your Project

Footer

  • Logo: Holzwerk
  • Tagline: Handcrafted woodwork since 1987

Services

  • Floor Building
  • Restoration
  • Camper-Vans

Contact

  • hello@holzwerk.de
  • +49 171 234 5678
  • Munich, Germany
